5-meo-eipt.dose_note: NOTE: These doses are tentative and it is recommended to do further research.
5-meo-eipt.name: 5-meo-eipt

properties.dose: Oral Threshold: 2-5mg Light: 5-10mg Common: 10-20mg Strong: 20-25mg+ | Insufflated Threshold: 1-3mg Light: 3-7mg Common: 7-15mg Strong: 15-20mg+
properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.summary: Little is known about this compound. It is a tryptamine and analogue of EiPT, and is also related to DiPT and DET. Probably a psychedelic. There are few reports of it's effects.
